Test Scenario: Verify user can sign up with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Enter a valid email address. 2. Enter a strong password. 3. Click "Sign Up".
Expected Result: User account is created successfully and user is redirected to the dashboard.

Test Scenario: Verify user cannot sign up with an already registered email
Test Steps: 1. Enter an email that is already in the database. 2. Enter a password. 3. Click "Sign Up".
Expected Result: System displays an error message "Email already in use".

Test Scenario: Verify user can log in with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Enter registered email. 2. Enter correct password. 3. Click "Login".
Expected Result: User is authenticated and redirected to the dashboard.

Test Scenario: Verify user cannot log in with invalid password
Test Steps: 1. Enter registered email. 2. Enter incorrect password. 3. Click "Login".
Expected Result: System displays an error message "Invalid credentials".

Test Scenario: Verify Forgot Password flow triggers Firebase email
Test Steps: 1. Enter registered email. 2. Click "Send Reset Link".
Expected Result: System displays a success toast message and Firebase sends a reset email.

Test Scenario: Verify Forgot Password handles unregistered emails
Test Steps: 1. Enter an email not in the database. 2. Click "Send Reset Link".
Expected Result: System displays an error message "No account found with this email address".

Test Scenario: Verify user can reset password via Firebase email link
Test Steps: 1. Click the link in the email. 2. Enter new password on Firebase white page. 3. Click Save.
Expected Result: Password is updated and user is shown a "Continue" button redirecting back to /login.

Test Scenario: Verify user can upgrade their plan to Premium
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the /pricing page
Test Steps: 1. Select Premium Plan. 2. Complete Stripe checkout.
Expected Result: User plan in the database is updated to Premium and dashboard reflects the new plan.

Test Scenario: Verify Dashboard loads user analytics correctly
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard. 2. Wait for data to load.
Expected Result: Dashboard displays correct focus time statistics and user details.

Test Scenario: Verify user can log out securely
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the Dashboard
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the /login page.

Test Scenario: Verify user can log in to the extension
Test Steps: 1. Open Extension. 2. Enter valid email and password. 3. Click Login.
Expected Result: Extension logs user in and displays the main focus interface.

Test Scenario: Verify user can start a focus session
Preconditions: User is logged into the extension
Expected Result: Timer begins counting down and extension enters Focus Mode.

Test Scenario: Verify distracting websites are blocked during focus session
Test Steps: 1. Open a new tab. 2. Navigate to a known distracting site (e.g. facebook.com).
Expected Result: The website is blocked and a "Focus Flow" block screen is displayed.

Test Scenario: Verify productive websites are accessible during focus session
Test Steps: 1. Open a new tab. 2. Navigate to a productive site (e.g. github.com).
Expected Result: The website loads normally without being blocked.

Test Scenario: Verify extension syncs focus data with web application
Test Steps: 1. Complete a focus session in the extension. 2. Open the Web Application dashboard.
Expected Result: The newly completed focus session data is accurately reflected on the web dashboard.

Test Scenario: Verify user can add a custom website to the blocklist
Preconditions: User is logged into the extension
Test Steps: 1. Go to Extension Settings. 2. Add "reddit.com" to the blocklist. 3. Start a focus session. 4. Visit reddit.com.
Expected Result: The website "reddit.com" is successfully blocked by the extension.

Test Scenario: Verify extension behavior when focus session timer ends
Preconditions: Focus session is active and timer hits 0:00
Expected Result: Extension displays a session completed notification and unblocks websites.
